notes: The X435-8P-2T-W has no AC power inlet — it is powered entirely via IEEE 802.3bt Type 4 PoE over its two RJ45 uplink ports (up to 90W each, 100W total PoE budget downstream). The uplinks are labeled as 10/100/1000BASE-T; 2.5G uplink support is noted as a future capability in some documentation. The console port uses RJ45 with RS-232 signaling (standard Extreme Networks console pinout). Port speeds confirmed as 1G max; grade eth-1g applied. No SFP ports on this -2T (copper uplink) variant — the -2X variant has SFP uplinks instead. The -W suffix indicates wireless management capability (ExtremeCloud IQ). Confirmed via Extreme Networks official documentation and netsolutionstore specs.

ports.name: Uplink 1
ports.note: 10/100/1000BASE-T 802.3bt Type 4 PoE PD input (up to 90W); powers the switch; also carries data

ports.name: Uplink 2
ports.note: 10/100/1000BASE-T 802.3bt Type 4 PoE PD input (up to 90W); powers the switch; also carries data

ports.name: Console
ports.note: RJ45 serial console/management port (RS-232 signaling over RJ45)

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB Type-A port for external flash storage
